Home / Services / Water Heater Installation

Water Heater Installation

Right-sized tank and tankless systems for Denver's hard water conditions.

Choosing a water heater for your Denver home isn't one-size-fits-all. Our specialists consider your household size, water usage patterns, and Colorado's mineral-rich water to recommend the perfect system.

For historic LoDo condos with limited space, we install compact tankless units that preserve square footage while delivering endless hot water. Families in Highlands Ranch often benefit from hybrid heat pump models that cut energy use by 60% - crucial with our rising utility rates.

We handle all aspects from permit pulling to final inspection, including:

- Hard water treatment system integration
- Earthquake strapping for seismic safety
- Smart thermostat compatibility
- Proper venting for high-altitude operation

Our installers train specifically on Denver's unique challenges - like adjusting gas pressure for tankless units at 5,280 feet. Whether you need a simple 40-gallon replacement for your Arvada ranch or a whole-home recirculation system in a RiNo loft, we've got you covered.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Comprehensive home evaluation and usage assessment
  2. 02 Step 2: Energy efficiency and cost comparison of options
  3. 03 Step 3: Professional removal of old unit (including proper disposal)
  4. 04 Step 4: Precision installation with code-compliant upgrades

Benefits

  • Altitude-adjusted performance tuning
  • 10-year labor warranty on installations
  • Rebate paperwork assistance
  • Local code compliance guaranteed

Frequently Asked Questions

How long do water heaters typically last in Denver?

With our hard water, traditional tanks last 8-12 years. We recommend annual flushing to extend lifespan - included free for our installation customers.

Can you install a solar water heater in Denver?

Yes! We're certified for solar thermal systems that take advantage of Colorado's 300+ sunny days per year, with backup integration for cloudy spells.

Do you service tankless warranties?

We're authorized dealers for all major brands, handling warranty claims directly so you don't have to.

Get a Free Estimate
